tasks.subject: Task 0: Baseline — go mod tidy + green build
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish known-good starting point; lock indirect deps.

**Files:** go.sum (auto-update)

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.sum"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go mod tidy clean", "go build ./... succeeds", "go test ./... passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Atomic package reorganization (pkg/auth → three-layer)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move pkg/auth/* and pkg/oidc/ into pkg/{account, credential/*, session, authn, protocol/oidc}. No semantic changes.

**Files:** 11 moves + import-line updates across pkg/server/* and cmd/. pkg/auth and pkg/oidc deleted.

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go test ./... && ! test -d pkg/auth && ! test -d pkg/oidc`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/account/", "pkg/credential/webauthn/", "pkg/credential/enrollment/", "pkg/credential/pairing/", "pkg/session/", "pkg/authn/", "pkg/protocol/oidc/", "pkg/server/"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pkg/auth deleted", "pkg/oidc deleted", "build green", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cosmetic decoupling — errorx.Error, RPDisplayName from config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename errorx.PicoTeraError → errorx.Error; lift RPDisplayName "PicoTera" to configx.WebAuthn.RPDisplayName (default "Prohibitorum"); strip remaining picotera comments.

**Files:** pkg/errorx/, pkg/configx/configx.go, pkg/credential/webauthn/webauthn.go, pkg/server/server.go, db/migrations/001_initial.sql header.

**Verify:** `! grep -rn PicoTera pkg/ cmd/ db/ && go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/errorx/", "pkg/configx/configx.go", "pkg/credential/webauthn/webauthn.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "! grep -rn PicoTera pkg/ cmd/ db/ && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PicoTeraError renamed everywhere", "RPDisplayName from config", "no picotera comments outside spec/audit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Schema rewrite — migrations 001+002, queries, contract, handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite migrations 001+002 per spec; add session/credential_event/auth_throttle/revoked_jti; expand oidc_client; regen sqlc; drop Permission types; update contract / pkg/account / pkg/credential/enrollment / pkg/server handlers to attributes jsonb model.

**Files:** db/migrations/001,002; db/queries/{account,enrollment,webauthn_credential,oidc,session,credential_event,auth_throttle}.sql; sqlc.yaml; pkg/db/ (regen); pkg/contract/auth.go; pkg/account/; pkg/credential/{webauthn,enrollment}/; pkg/server/handle_*; pkg/server/server.go.

**Verify:** `mise run db:up && go build ./... && go test ./... && ! grep -rn 'can_view_own\|PermViewOwnUsage' pkg/ cmd/ db/`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/001_initial.sql", "db/migrations/002_oidc.sql", "db/queries/", "sqlc.yaml", "pkg/db/", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/account/", "pkg/credential/", "pkg/server/"], "verifyCommand": "mise run db:up && go build ./... && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migrations apply clean", "sqlc regen clean", "build green", "tests pass", "no can_* refs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migration 003 — password_credential, totp_credential, recovery_code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add password+TOTP+recovery_code schema; queries; sqlc regen. No Go usage yet.

**Files:** db/migrations/003_password_totp.sql; db/queries/{password_credential,totp_credential,recovery_code}.sql; sqlc.yaml; pkg/db/.

**Verify:** `mise run db:up && sqlc generate && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/003_password_totp.sql", "db/queries/password_credential.sql", "db/queries/totp_credential.sql", "db/queries/recovery_code.sql", "sqlc.yaml", "pkg/db/"], "verifyCommand": "mise run db:up && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["003 applies clean", "sqlc generates", "build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Migration 004 — upstream_idp + account_identity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add federation tables; ALTER session add upstream_idp_id; queries; sqlc regen.

**Files:** db/migrations/004_federation.sql; db/queries/{upstream_idp,account_identity}.sql; sqlc.yaml; pkg/db/.

**Verify:** `mise run db:up && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/004_federation.sql", "db/queries/upstream_idp.sql", "db/queries/account_identity.sql", "sqlc.yaml", "pkg/db/"], "verifyCommand": "mise run db:up && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["004 applies clean", "session.upstream_idp_id exists", "sqlc generates", "build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Migration 005 — SAML tables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add saml_sp + saml_sp_acs + saml_sp_key + saml_subject_id + saml_session; queries; sqlc regen.

**Files:** db/migrations/005_saml.sql; db/queries/saml_sp.sql; sqlc.yaml; pkg/db/.

**Verify:** `mise run db:up && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/005_saml.sql", "db/queries/saml_sp.sql", "sqlc.yaml", "pkg/db/"], "verifyCommand": "mise run db:up && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["005 applies clean", "5 SAML tables exist", "sqlc generates", "build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Stub packages + configx extensions + audit writer wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land empty stubs for pkg/credential/password, pkg/credential/totp, pkg/federation/oidc, pkg/protocol/saml, pkg/authn/flow, pkg/audit. Extend configx with OIDCConfig, FederationConfig, TOTPConfig, SAMLConfig, PasswordHashParams, DataEncryptionKeys versioned set. Wire audit.Writer through server.New.

**Files:** pkg/credential/{password,totp}/, pkg/federation/oidc/, pkg/protocol/saml/, pkg/authn/flow.go, pkg/audit/event.go, pkg/configx/configx.go, pkg/server/server.go, cmd/prohibitorum/main.go.

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/credential/password/password.go", "pkg/credential/totp/totp.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/saml.go", "pkg/authn/flow.go", "pkg/audit/event.go", "pkg/configx/configx.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all stub packages compile", "configx substructs added", "audit writer wired", "build + vet clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: User-facing doc rewrites (DESIGN/STATUS/AUDIT/INTEGRATION/README)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite top-level docs to match the rescoped service. No picotera vocabulary in user-facing docs (spec/audit reports retain it as audit trail).

**Files:** DESIGN.md, STATUS.md, AUDIT.md, INTEGRATION.md, README.md.

**Verify:** `! grep -rni picotera DESIGN.md STATUS.md AUDIT.md INTEGRATION.md README.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["DESIGN.md", "STATUS.md", "AUDIT.md", "INTEGRATION.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "! grep -rni picotera DESIGN.md STATUS.md AUDIT.md INTEGRATION.md README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no picotera in user docs", "DESIGN reflects 3-layer arch", "AUDIT has password+TOTP+federation+SAML sections", "INTEGRATION adds Pattern C SAML"]}
```
